summary: 3/4 checks. SFX fix (BUG-SFX-MISSING-SOUNDS) fully verified PASS. Day counter (S2-DAY-TICK-FIX) confirmed FAIL — unchanged. Anam death formula PARTIAL: death_cap_cards=30 matches bible min(cartes/30,1.0), BUT _apply_add_anam() pre-credits card-effect anam to meta immediately with no death penalty applied. BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX(P10) created. 1 new feedback question for director.

checks.description: BUG-SFX-MISSING-SOUNDS fix verification: 7 sounds in sfx_recipes_ambient.gd + SFXManager names + volume routing
checks.evidence: sfx_recipes_ambient.gd lines 642-755: gen_card_reveal(), gen_confirm(), gen_encounter(), gen_success(), gen_fail(), gen_neutral(), gen_danger() all present. SFXManager line 161: all 7 names in names[]. Volume routing: card_reveal/confirm/neutral→ui_bus (line 127), encounter/danger→magic_bus (line 129), success/fail→transition_bus (line 131). Fix complete and verified.

checks.description: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX regression check: run[day] still not incremented in resolve_choice()
checks.evidence: Line 19: run['day'] = 1 (init only). resolve_choice() lines 132-179: no increment of run['day']. End-run checks lines 208, 227, 244: all return run.get('day', 1) → always 1. LLM context will always show 'Jour 1'. Consistent with S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST CHK-4.
checks.fix_required: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX (P8): CARDS_PER_DAY constant + run['day'] += 1 when cards_played % CARDS_PER_DAY == 0 in resolve_choice().

checks.description: Anam death penalty formula: min(cards_played/30, 1.0) applied to run-end base reward
checks.evidence: merlin_constants.gd line 383: ANAM_REWARDS.death_cap_cards = 30. store_run.gd calculate_run_rewards() line 348: death_cap = ANAM_REWARDS.get('death_cap_cards', 30). Line 351: ratio = minf(cards_played / death_cap, 1.0). Line 352: anam = int(anam * ratio). Formula matches bible s.5.1 min(cartes/30, 1.0). Base reward correctly scaled.

checks.description: Anam death penalty scope: card-effect ADD_ANAM also subject to death ratio
checks.evidence: merlin_effect_engine.gd _apply_add_anam() lines 437-442: ADD_ANAM effect writes BOTH run['anam'] += amount AND meta['anam'] += amount immediately. meta['anam'] is then saved via save_profile() at run end. The death penalty ratio (CHK-3) is only applied to the BASE REWARD formula (ANAM_BASE_REWARD + bonuses), not to card-effect anam already in meta. Bible s.5.1 'Mort = Anam × min(cartes/30, 1.0)' is ambiguous: it could mean all in-run anam or just the run-end reward. Currently card-effect anam is immune to death penalty. Created BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX(P10) + feedback question q-20260414-001.
checks.fix_required: Track anam_accumulated separately from meta. Apply death ratio to in-run ADD_ANAM gains before crediting to meta. See BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX.

regression_checks.note: No new code touched merlin_constants.gd drain path.
store_run.gd resolve_choice() unchanged — still no auto-recovery logic.
store_run.gd check_promise_deadlines() unchanged — still uses active_promises.

regression_checks.description: SFX names all present (7 new + existing 57 total)
regression_checks.note: CHK-1 confirms. No removal of existing sounds detected.

new_bugs_created.description: Card-effect ADD_ANAM credited to meta immediately without death penalty. Death ratio only applied to base reward.

fail_list: CHK-4: ADD_ANAM death penalty scope — new finding

verdict_rationale: PARTIAL_PASS. SFX fix fully verified — 7 new sounds work correctly. Day counter remains broken (known P8 task). Anam death formula has correct divisor (30) but incorrect scope: card-effect anam bypasses the death penalty. This is a MEDIUM design discrepancy vs bible s.5.1. Director feedback requested to clarify intent before implementing the fix.
